answer: \boxed{Hal needs to be taken to England because he is the legitimate heir to the Wynnegate estate, having inherited it through his father, Henry Wynnegate, Earl of Kerhill. Jim (Capt. Wynnegate) believes it is his duty to ensure Hal receives his rightful inheritance and social standing. The English solicitor pressures Jim into this decision, framing it as the only way to preserve the family legacy and reputation.}
